news.title:
Nifty Auto recovers strongly; M&M, Bajaj Auto, TVS Motor lead gains.
IDBI Bank falls 17% on divestment concerns; NSE ratio at 1:2.
news.summary:
Nifty Auto recovers strongly; M&M, Bajaj Auto, TVS Motor lead gains.
IDBI Bank falls 17% on divestment concerns; NSE ratio at 1:2.

news.title:
Nifty Auto index dropped 3% due to West Asia tensions; stocks like M&M, Maruti, Eicher, Tata Motors led declines.
Natural gas supply fears, crude above $100/barrel, and rising costs pose operational risks to auto manufacturers.
news.summary:
Nifty Auto index dropped 3% due to West Asia tensions; stocks like M&M, Maruti, Eicher, Tata Motors led declines.
Natural gas supply fears, crude above $100/barrel, and rising costs pose operational risks to auto manufacturers.

news.title:
Mahindra & Mahindra executed NSE block trade for 171,194 shares at Rs. 3072.30.
The transaction totaled Rs. 52.6 crores.
news.summary:
Mahindra & Mahindra executed NSE block trade for 171,194 shares at Rs. 3072.30.

news.title:
Mahindra & Mahindra participated in Arihant Bharat Connect Conference on 11th March 2026.
Presentation from 11th Feb 2026 was shared; no sensitive info disclosed.
news.summary:

news.title: Mahindra & Mahindra highlights strong growth in India's EV ecosystem.
news.summary: Mahindra & Mahindra highlights strong growth in India's EV ecosystem.

news.title:
M&M's production rose 13.1% YoY in Feb'26 to 94,550 units.
M&M stock rose 2.1% to Rs 3,253.75, showcasing strong growth.
news.summary:
M&M's production rose 13.1% YoY in Feb'26 to 94,550 units.

news.title:
Rising freight costs increase logistics expenses, cutting exporters' profit margins to Africa.
M&M reports strong tractor exports to Africa despite higher freight costs.
news.summary:
Rising freight costs increase logistics expenses, cutting exporters' profit margins to Africa.
M&M reports strong tractor exports to Africa despite higher freight costs.

news.title:
Mahindra & Mahindra exits loss-making international subsidiaries in Japan, Finland, and Sri Lanka, reducing annual losses by ₹313 crore in FY26.
Key loss-making subsidiaries remain in the US, Turkey, Mauritius, and Germany, totaling ₹670 crore losses in FY25. Focus shifts to profitable growth.
news.summary:
Mahindra & Mahindra exits loss-making international subsidiaries in Japan, Finland, and Sri Lanka, reducing annual losses by ₹313 crore in FY26.
Key loss-making subsidiaries remain in the US, Turkey, Mauritius, and Germany, totaling ₹670 crore losses in FY25. Focus shifts to profitable growth.

news.title: Mahindra & Mahindra states no communication received from Indonesia on vehicle order suspension.
news.summary: Mahindra & Mahindra states no communication received from Indonesia on vehicle order suspension.

news.title:
Mahindra & Mahindra sold its 20% stake in a waste solutions firm on March 2, 2026.
The unit had Rs. 5.97 crore revenue, Rs. 9.03 crore net worth; sale fetched Rs. 5.07 crore.
news.summary:
Mahindra & Mahindra sold its 20% stake in a waste solutions firm on March 2, 2026.
The unit had Rs. 5.97 crore revenue, Rs. 9.03 crore net worth; sale fetched Rs. 5.07 crore.

news.title:
Mahindra & Mahindra sold its remaining 20% stake in Blue Planet Integrated Waste Solutions to BPES India on 2nd March 2026.
Post-sale, BPIWSPL ceases to be M&M's associate; Rs. 5.07 crore received as consideration.
news.summary:
Mahindra & Mahindra sold its remaining 20% stake in Blue Planet Integrated Waste Solutions to BPES India on 2nd March 2026.
Post-sale, BPIWSPL ceases to be M&M's associate; Rs. 5.07 crore received as consideration.

news.title:
Mitsubishi Mahindra Agricultural Machinery Co. exits agri machinery business; parts supply & warranty services continue.
Liquidation process to start for other operations by Mitsubishi Mahindra Agricultural Machinery Co.
news.summary:
Mitsubishi Mahindra Agricultural Machinery Co. exits agri machinery business; parts supply & warranty services continue.
Liquidation process to start for other operations by Mitsubishi Mahindra Agricultural Machinery Co.

news.title:
M&M plans to exit agri machinery business in Japan by FY27.
It will offer parts and warranty support during transition phase.
news.summary:
M&M plans to exit agri machinery business in Japan by FY27.
It will offer parts and warranty support during transition phase.

news.title:
Mahindra Farm Equipment sold 32,153 tractors domestically in Feb 2026, a 35% YoY growth.
Total tractor sales, including exports, reached 34,133 units; exports grew 20% YoY to 1,980 units.
news.summary:
Mahindra Farm Equipment sold 32,153 tractors domestically in Feb 2026, a 35% YoY growth.
Total tractor sales, including exports, reached 34,133 units; exports grew 20% YoY to 1,980 units.

news.title:
Mahindra exits Japan agri-machinery business post strategic review; production to cease by FY27.
MAM incurred losses; revenue for FY25 Rs 2,094.2 cr; M&M shares down 2.8% at Rs 3,303.9 on BSE.
news.summary:
Mahindra exits Japan agri-machinery business post strategic review; production to cease by FY27.
MAM incurred losses; revenue for FY25 Rs 2,094.2 cr; M&M shares down 2.8% at Rs 3,303.9 on BSE.

news.title:
Mahindra & Mahindra to exit Japanese farm equipment JV with Mitsubishi Agricultural Machinery.
The decision follows long-term viability concerns amid global demand shifts and industry pressures.
news.summary:
Mahindra & Mahindra to exit Japanese farm equipment JV with Mitsubishi Agricultural Machinery.
The decision follows long-term viability concerns amid global demand shifts and industry pressures.

news.title:
M&M Auto's total sales rose 18% YoY to 97,177 units, with domestic PV sales up 19% to 60,018 units.
Exports grew 11% to 3,384 units; tractor sales surged 34% YoY to 34,133 units.
news.summary:
M&M Auto's total sales rose 18% YoY to 97,177 units, with domestic PV sales up 19% to 60,018 units.
Exports grew 11% to 3,384 units; tractor sales surged 34% YoY to 34,133 units.

news.title:
Indonesia halts vehicle imports from Tata Motors and Mahindra & Mahindra.
105,000 vehicle order, India's largest export deal, faces policy pushback.
news.summary:
Indonesia halts vehicle imports from Tata Motors and Mahindra & Mahindra.
105,000 vehicle order, India's largest export deal, faces policy pushback.

news.title:
Mahindra & Mahindra participated in Kotak Chasing Growth 2026 event in Mumbai.
No unpublished price-sensitive information shared; presentation available on company's website.
news.summary:

news.title:
Mahindra & Mahindra selected Mobileye's ADAS platforms for six models, with production starting in 2027.
The deal strengthens Mobileye's role in India's ADAS ecosystem but doesn't offset near-term revenue pressures or losses.
news.summary:
Mahindra & Mahindra selected Mobileye's ADAS platforms for six models, with production starting in 2027.
